title: Claude Code can Design Now (Figma is officially in trouble)
author: RileyBrown
summary_bullets: Today, we're going to use Claude Code to design our personal site on Figma.
We're actually going to be using a different tool, one that is built specifically for AI agents, and it's called Paper.
And many designers are telling me that they're switching from Figma to Paper because it's easier to use with AI agents like Claude Code and OpenClaw.
So, in this video, we're going to download Paper.
Then, we're going to connect Paper to Claude Code.
Then we're going to use Claude Code to design our site.
Then we're going to turn that site into an actual web page that I will use and put on the internet.
And so this channel is all about using AI agents to run your business effectively.
And if you like these types of videos, I make them multiple times per week.
Okay, so in order to do this workflow, we're going to need two tools.
